## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New service / stack
- [ ] Configuration improvement

## Affected Stack(s)
- [ ] core (Traefik, Portainer)
- [ ] monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana, exporters)
- [ ] apps (Nextcloud, Vaultwarden, Ollama)

- [ ] docs
- [ ] config

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested this on a Raspberry Pi 4B (or equivalent ARM64 device)
- [ ] All image tags are pinned to specific versions (no `:latest`)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new environment variables were added
- [ ] `docs/` updated if deployment steps changed
- [ ] CI passes (lint, compose validate, shellcheck)
- [ ] No secrets or real credentials committed
